title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
